case_title: CHERYL L. HOGAN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGAN, CHERYL L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ALTHOUGH THE COURT WAS TROUBLED BY THE ALLEGATIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AWARD OF DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HOGAN, CHERYL L. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,003.00 FILED BY HOGAN, CHERYL L. AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOGAN, CHERYL L. AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.
